# btpservice_cicd_allowed_spaces (Data Source)

Reads the list of allowed spaces in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_allowed_spaces" "all" {}

output "allowed_space_guids" {
  value = [for s in data.btpservice_cicd_allowed_spaces.all.values : s.space_guid]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the data source.
- `values` (Attributes Set) The set of allowed Cloud Foundry spaces. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Read-Only:

- `comment` (String) Human-readable note about why this space is allowed.
- `space_guid` (String) GUID of the Cloud Foundry space.
